buildCommand: git clone --depth 1 -b stable https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git /tmp/flutter && export PATH="/tmp/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter config --no-analytics && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
